message:
feat(openapi-display): add schema depth limiting (bd-181r)

Enhances schema type visualization with:

- max_schema_depth config option (default: 5) to limit nesting depth
- Updated render_schema_plain and render_schema_minimal to check depth
- Renders "... (max depth exceeded)" when limit is reached
- Prevents runaway rendering of very deeply nested schemas

Added 2 new tests:
- test_schema_depth_limiting: verifies depth limit is enforced
- test_nested_schema_rendering: tests nested object/array schemas

Total tests: 15 (up from 13)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
